content:
First write \(n=[r]\) and \(f=\{r\}\).  Then the equation is
\[
25f + n = 125,
\]
so
\[
f = \frac{125 - n}{25} = 5 - \frac{n}{25}.
\]
Since \(0\le f<1\), we need
\[
0\le 5 - \frac{n}{25} <1
\quad\Longrightarrow\quad
0\le n\le125
\quad\text{and}\quad
4<\frac{n}{25}\le5
\;\Longrightarrow\;100<n\le125.
\]
Hence \(n\) runs over the integers \(101,102,\dots,125\) (25 values).  For each such \(n\),
\[
r = n + f = n + 5 - \frac{n}{25} = \frac{24n + 125}{25}.
\]
Thus the sum of all solutions is
\[
\sum_{n=101}^{125}r
=\sum_{n=101}^{125}\frac{24n+125}{25}
=\frac{1}{25}\Bigl(24\sum_{n=101}^{125}n \;+\;125\cdot25\Bigr).
\]
But
\(\displaystyle\sum_{n=101}^{125}n=\frac{(101+125)\cdot25}{2}=2825\), so
\[
\sum r
=\frac{1}{25}\bigl(24\cdot2825+3125\bigr)
=\frac{70925}{25}
=2837.
\]
Answer: \(\boxed{2837}\).
